core_principle.statement: Icons are simplified engineering system diagrams, not decorative illustrations.
core_principle.interpretation: Each icon must represent a functional system component within architectural engineering logic.

icon_system_foundation.purpose: Communicate system functions clearly and structurally

stroke_style.rule: No variation in stroke thickness within icon set

grid_system.alignment: All icons must snap to grid nodes

icon_semantic_system.icon_logic: Abstract structural grid or foundation line system
Modular grid assembly or connected blocks

icon_semantic_system.meaning: Final system activation or decision point

icon_hierarchy_rules.rule: No icon may exceed its functional semantic level

color_system.accent_rule: Gold only used for transformation or key system nodes

icon_behavior_rules.consistency: All icons must belong to a single unified system style
icon_behavior_rules.scalability: Must remain legible at 16px and scalable to large formats
icon_behavior_rules.simplicity: Icons must be reduced to minimum structural elements
icon_behavior_rules.clarity: Each icon must be immediately understandable as a system function

system_integration_rules.ui_usage: Icons must align with typography and grid system
system_integration_rules.documentation_usage: Icons must behave like engineering diagrams
system_integration_rules.branding_usage: Icons must reinforce system-based identity, not decoration

user_feeling: This is a technical engineering system
This brand communicates like an architectural model

strategic_goal.objective: Create a unified icon language that behaves like an engineering system diagram set
strategic_goal.outcome: Consistent recognition of AvizSazeh as an architectural engineering system brand
